key_files.name: boss.game.go

key_files.notes: 8 encounter templates, budget system, room-aware spawning

key_files.notes: 4 biomes with enemy pools, loot tables, gen overrides

key_files.notes: EXP awards, monster death handling, boss death integration

key_files.notes: BiomeConfig integration, FloorContext with biome overrides

key_files.name: spells.game.go
key_files.notes: 6 spell types, monster-cast fireball collision handling

key_files.name: entities.game.go
key_files.notes: Monster projectile updates, spell cast conversion, visibility-gated rendering

key_files.name: player.go
key_files.notes: EffectHolder integration, status effect modifiers

key_files.name: monster.go
key_files.notes: 7 behaviors, PathTargetX/Y tracking, PendingSpells, improved AI recalc

key_files.name: boss.go
key_files.notes: Boss struct (embeds Monster), multi-phase, Dungeon Guardian

key_files.name: effects.go
key_files.notes: 6 status effects: Poison, Burn, Slow, Shield, Weaken, Haste

key_files.name: ranged.monster.go
key_files.notes: RangedBehavior: maintain distance, fire projectiles

key_files.name: patrol.monster.go
key_files.notes: PatrolBehavior: walk waypoints, chase when triggered

key_files.name: swarm.monster.go
key_files.notes: SwarmBehavior: cluster movement, group triggering

key_files.name: caster.monster.go
key_files.notes: CasterBehavior: keeps distance, casts fireballs via PendingSpellCast

key_files.name: monster_projectile.go
key_files.notes: MonsterProjectile struct for ranged attacks

key_files.notes: Room metadata populated, arena pillar placement

key_files.notes: Room struct, RoomAt(), IsPassable(), IsWalkable(), DoorDensity

key_files.notes: BFS with passable func param, FindSpawnAndExit crosses doors

key_files.name: loot.go

key_files.notes: Boss health bar rendered at top-center of screen
